title: BROADN designer-mode layout overrides
description: Hand-authored per-slice LayoutDescriptor overrides exported by designer mode. Merged (whole-descriptor-per (kind,key)) on top of the generated data/project-layouts.json by BOTH the runtime (getLayoutFor) and scripts/build_layouts.py. Each override descriptor reuses the canonical LayoutDescriptor contract from layout-schema.json (no duplication). location overrides are keyed by site_code, lab_group by group_name, project by project_id.
